note: 65 year old female admitted with substernal chest pain. ECG showed anterior STEMI. Taken to cath lab, drug eluting stent placed in proximal LAD. Discharged on aspirin 81 mg daily, atorvastatin 80 mg daily, metoprolol 25 mg BID.
reference_summary: 65 year old female admitted for anterior STEMI, treated with drug eluting stent to the proximal LAD. Discharged on aspirin, atorvastatin, and metoprolol.

note: 72 year old male with COPD presenting with acute exacerbation. Treated with nebulized albuterol, IV methylprednisolone transitioned to oral prednisone, and azithromycin. Discharged on a prednisone taper and home inhalers.
reference_summary: 72 year old male admitted for COPD exacerbation, treated with nebulizers, steroids, and azithromycin. Discharged on a prednisone taper and home inhalers.

note: 45 year old female admitted with fever, cough, and right lower lobe infiltrate consistent with community acquired pneumonia. Treated with IV ceftriaxone and azithromycin. Improved clinically and discharged on oral levofloxacin to complete a 7 day course.
reference_summary: 45 year old female admitted for community acquired pneumonia, treated with IV ceftriaxone and azithromycin. Discharged on oral levofloxacin to complete a 7 day course.

note: 58 year old male admitted with diabetic ketoacidosis. Treated with IV insulin drip and aggressive fluid resuscitation. Anion gap closed. Discharged on basal bolus insulin regimen with endocrinology follow up.
reference_summary: 58 year old male admitted for diabetic ketoacidosis, treated with IV insulin and fluid resuscitation. Discharged on a basal bolus insulin regimen.

note: 30 year old female presenting with pleuritic chest pain and dyspnea. CT pulmonary angiogram confirmed segmental pulmonary embolism. Started on apixaban with no bleeding complications. Discharged on apixaban.
reference_summary: 30 year old female admitted for segmental pulmonary embolism diagnosed by CT pulmonary angiogram, started on apixaban. Discharged on apixaban with no bleeding complications.
